input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8867 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 2.6.3 tests fail because Spring Boot 3.0 changed Actuator APIs: HttpTrace moved to the HttpExchange/HttpExchanges API, and several endpoint constructors/descriptors changed. Generated tests must target the 3.0 API, but this is not an external setup requirement.

Some optional Actuator integration areas, such as metrics, Redis, MongoDB, Couchbase, RabbitMQ, Liquibase, servlet, or reactive web filters, reference optional libraries or services. Avoid those integration-specific paths unless tests intentionally add the corresponding dependency or service setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The resolved org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0 artifact has only spring-boot as a required dependency, which brings the Spring core/context stack needed to exercise core Actuator endpoints directly. Meaningful coverage is reachable without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or environment/system properties.
